arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Fulham
arts.sum: Manchester United desperately need FA Cup success to salvage a torrid campaign and there will be huge pressure on them to reach the quarter-finals on Sunday afternoon. CB: Leny Yoro - United's central defensive trio will be tested by the powerful Raul Jimenez, who should return to the starting XI on Sunday.

arts.ttl: 15 players could miss Manchester United vs Fulham after Ruben Amorim gives injury update
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as Ruben Amorim and Co. prepare to face Fulham in the fifth round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Glazer family told they made their biggest Man Utd mistake 12 years ago - 'It's a joke!'
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson and David Gill both left Manchester United in the of 2013, and ex-United chief Peter Kenyon feels the failure to act then is still costing the club now

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe blasted for summer 'stupidity' which is making Man Utd even worse
arts.sum: Manchester United decided to stick with Erik ten Hag in the summer despite him being on borrowed time, and that decision has made left harder for Ruben Amorim since he was appointed

arts.ttl: Ex-Man Utd star makes 'major' Leny Yoro prediction with Arsenal and Liverpool comparison
arts.sum: Manchester United paid £52million to sign Leny Yoro from Lille last summer and after his Premier League debut was delayed due to a pre-season injury, the defender has impressed Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Chido Obi: 'Insanely exciting' wonderkid told he MUST succeed at Man Utd
arts.sum: Denmark head coach Brian Riemer believes that Manchester United striker Chido Obi is an 'insanely exciting' talent who needs to play regularly. Viaplay has now quizzed Denmark boss Brian Riemer about Obi and the coach admitted that the striker is 'insanely exciting' but made it clear that he would first have to succeed in winning himself a regular place in the Man Utd side before being considered.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Los Blancos 'to battle Liverpool, Man United' for Bournemouth star
arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly join the likes of Liverpool and Manchester United in the race for for Bournemouth defender Milos Kerkez.

arts.ttl: Man United wonderkid 'wanted by Barcelona' as Catalan giants 'look to take advantage' of English club's financial concerns
arts.sum: Barcelona are allegedly interested in signing Manchester United attacker Alejandro Garnacho during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Everton, Fulham and Bournemouth vying for rival Premier League club's captain
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Everton, Fulham and Bournemouth are ready to make approaches for a rival Premier League club’s captain. Everton have turned...

arts.ttl: Burnley stars snubbed handshake after former Man United star faced alleged racism abuse
arts.sum: Hannibal Mejbri was allegedly racially abused by Milutin Osmajic a fortnight ago and Burnley's players showed their support for the midfielder by refusing to shake his hand
